title.en: Now, his other origin is also skyrocketing.

content.en:
With the help of the Eternal Ruin Divine Array's cultivation of this hundred primeval era, he not only broke the shackles of the realm of the Origin Rule of the Other Fifty Percent, but also raised it to the realm of Fifty Percent Eight.

After the Origin Rule of the Other Shore reaches fifty percent, every point of improvement in the realm is a huge improvement.

Now, his other origin is also skyrocketing.

He went to test it, and the origin on the other side reached more than 8,200, which was very close to the 10,000 origin at the peak of the Origin Lower Realm.

Not long after Ye Tiancai came out of the customs, the Lord of Qingyun came to find Ye Tian.

"I've seen the Lord of Qingyun!"

Ye Tian shouted.

"Lord of Endless, I don't know where you got so much Ruin God Gold from, and you won't be excessive. I want to ask, can you trade some ruin god gold for me, I am willing to trade the other side of the Yuan ruin liquid. The Lord of Qingyun said.

The other side of the Yuanxu liquid!

As soon as Ye Tian heard this name, his heart was immediately moved.

Like the Purple Ruins Gold Liquid on the other side, it can also improve the origin of the other side, but the effect is very poor, and a large amount of the Purple Ruins gold liquid on the other side can only improve the origin of the other side a little.

The Purple Ruins Gold Liquid on the other side is more suitable for breaking the realm and using it when the origin of the other side is stagnant.

The Yuanxu liquid on the other side is different, this resource exists to enhance the origin of the other side, and the effect is far from being comparable to the purple ruin gold liquid on the other side.

For the Heavenly Ancestor of the Origin and Lower Realm, the Yuan Ruins Liquid on the other side was more important than other treasures.

If it was other Origin Realm Heavenly Ancestors, they would hesitate to exchange the Ruin God Gold for the Yuan Ruins Liquid on the other side.

After all, ruin god gold is really rare.

But Ye Tian agreed without hesitation.

"Lord Qingyun, I agree!"

He could easily obtain the Ruin God Gold, so naturally it was not recommended to trade some Ruin God Gold for the Yuan Ruins Liquid on the other side.

In this way, he can break through to the peak realm of the Origin Lower Realm faster!

Seeing that Ye Tian agreed, the Lord of Qingyun was very excited.

They then discussed the details of the deal.

In the end, Ye Tian exchanged a piece of ruin god gold for ten cubic meters of Yuanxu liquid from the Lord of Qingyun for ten cubic meters of Yuanxu liquid.

It is also the Lord of Qingyun who has so much Yuan Ruins liquid on the other side, and he can't take it out at all if he exchanges it with other Origin Realm Heavenly Ancestors.

Of course.

Only Ye Tiancai can easily take out a thousand pieces of Ruin God Gold!

Soon, the deal was completed and both parties were satisfied.

......

"The Lord of Endless has used up 10,000 pieces of Ruin God Gold before, and now he has easily taken out 1,000 pieces of Ruin God Gold, he is afraid that he still has a lot of Ruin God Gold!" said the Lord of Qingyun secretly.

Of course.

He's not going to look into anything.

For him, it was enough to be able to trade a thousand pieces of ruin god gold from Ye Tian this time.

The other side.

Ye Tian began to use the Yuanxu liquid on the other side to improve his origin on the other side.

Grunt!

A large amount of the Yuan Ruins Liquid on the other side was swallowed by Ye Tian, and then refined it, improving his origin on the other side little by little.

I have to say that the effect of the Yuanxu liquid on the other side is still quite good.

Time passed slowly, and Ye Tian's other origin gradually grew.

Meanwhile.

Ye Tian was still collecting the ruin god gold in the Thousand Caves Snake Domain of the Innocent Abyss, because he had traded some ruin god gold with the Lord of Qingyun before, the ruin god gold on his body was not too much now, and he couldn't get together 10,000 yuan.

But.

He only needs to scrape together a few more, and he can definitely scrape together 10,000 pieces of ruin god gold.

In the blink of an eye, hundreds of primeval epochs have passed.

Ye Tian had already exhausted all the Yuan Ruins liquid refining on the other side, and when he went to test it, his other side origin had already been raised to 10260.

In other words, he had already reached the peak realm of the Origin Lower Realm.

But he can continue to improve a little, and the limit of the Origin Lower Realm is 20,000 Origin Origins on the other side.

He naturally wants to raise the origin of the other side to the limit of the origin and lower realm, so that when he breaks through, his strength will increase more, and after the breakthrough, the origin of the other side will be increased more.

Overall, it's definitely a good deal.

Another period of time has passed.

this day.

Ye Tian finally gathered 10,000 pieces of ruin god gold.

"There are very few ruin god gold in the Thousand Caves Snake Domain, unless you keep digging and hollowing out the entire Thousand Caves Snake Domain, you can find so many ruin god gold!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

Of course.

He can also continue to wait for a long time, and maybe some ruin god gold will be born again.

But he couldn't wait that long, so he could only go back to the other places of the Innocent Abyss to find the Ruin God Gold.

this day.

Ye Tian once again built an Eternal Ruins Divine Array on Wind Tooth Island, which shocked those Origin Realm Heavenly Ancestors on Wind Tooth Island.

In the blink of an eye, more than a hundred primeval years have passed.

This Eternal Ruins Divine Array was destroyed again, but Ye Tian's Origin Rule on the other side improved again, reaching the realm of sixty into six, and making the Origin of the Other Shore reach the level of more than sixteen thousand.

Judging from the fact that the Origin Rules of the Other Shore are improved and the Origin of the Other Shore grows more, perhaps he can reach the extreme of the Origin Realm by raising the Origin Rules of the Other Shore to the realm of seventy percent.

In other words, he had to scrape together 10,000 ruin god gold again.

"The ruin god gold of the Thousand Caves Snake Domain is hard to find, and I have to go to another place. "

Ye Tian has been exploring the treasure land where the Innocent Abyss can give birth to the Ruin God Gold, the Thousand Caves Snake Domain is only one of them, and the number of Ruin God Gold in the Thousand Caves Snake Domain is not very large, otherwise, those top Origin Middle Realm or Origin Upper Realm Heavenly Ancestors will go to the Thousand Caves Snake Domain to find the Ruin God Gold at all costs.

After all, they could choose not to kill the Innocent Demon Snake, so that the danger they encountered would not be great.

But the benefits are not proportional to the dangers, so they naturally don't bother to venture to the Thousand Caves Snake Domain.

Now, Ye Tian has found a second good place - the Shadow River.

The Shadow River is a river in the Unsullied Abyss, and it is also dangerous, but the Shadow River has also given birth to some ruin god gold, located in the mountains at the bottom of the river.

There is a terrifying creature in the Shadow River, the Shadow Dragon, a terrifying creature that has the ability to absorb damage, which means that it is difficult to kill them.

The point is that the strength of the Innocent Shadow Dragon is very strong, unlike the single strength of the Innocent Demon Snake, which is very weak, only when a large number of Innocent Demon Snakes fall, a terrifying Innocent Demon Snake will be superimposed.

And among the Innocent Shadow Dragons, there are many geniuses comparable to those on the other side of the Origin Middle Realm, and there is also a rumored Innocent Shadow Dragon comparable to the Origin Upper Realm.

Therefore, even if it is the Origin Upper Realm, he does not dare to enter here easily, otherwise once he is entangled by an Innocent Shadow Dragon of the Origin Upper Realm, not only will he not be able to hurt the other party, but he will also be in danger.

Ye Tian was going to sneak into the Shadow River, copy an innocent shadow dragon, and then dive into the Shadow River to find the ruin god gold.

If the plan goes well, you can definitely get a lot of Ruin God Gold this time. ~
